name: Mechanized Infantry
official_rules_text: At the start of the Activation Phase, each unit with the Mechanized Infantry keyword may choose a different allied vehicle unit within 2. If they do, the unit with the Mechanized Infantry keyword and each chosen unit gain 1 Aim token or 1 Dodge token.
description: At the start of the Activation Phase, each unit with the Mechanized Infantry keyword may choose a different allied vehicle unit within 2. If they do, the unit with the Mechanized Infantry keyword and each chosen unit gain 1 Aim token or 1 Dodge token.
